description: CompositionGrey printed kurta made of 100% cotton, with raglan sleeves that are ruched near the neckline, has a Mandarin collar neckline and a buttoned chest placket, pintucks on the centre chest ending in random pleats and has a curved hem with split sidesFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeHot iron inside outEthnic is back with a bang in the form of this printed kurta from w! Look ethnically hip in these raglan sleeves, while the pure cotton fabric keeps you absolutely fresh and comfortable through the day. Team it with leggings or a loose white or dark red kameez and chunky accessories for a chic look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in kurtasHeight-5.6", Chest-32"
